Class DirectedGraphBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.graphite.builder.AbstractGraphBuilder<DirectedGraph, DirectedGraphBuilder>
io.graphite.builder.DirectedGraphBuilder
public final class DirectedGraphBuilder extends AbstractGraphBuilder<DirectedGraph, DirectedGraphBuilder>
Builds mutable or immutable directed graphs using a fluent API.

The DirectedGraphBuilder provides a convenient and readable way to construct directed graphs by incrementally adding vertices, edges, and configuration options before creating the final graph instance.

IGraph graph = Graphs.directed()
        .vertices(5)
        .addEdge(0, 1)
        .addEdge(1, 2)
        .immutable()
        .build();

Features

  • Fluent builder API
  • Directed graph construction
  • Weighted and unweighted edges
  • Mutable or immutable graphs

Implementation Notes

Builder instances are mutable and are intended for single-use during graph construction.

Since:
2.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay
